title: play kube crashes on missing `image` container  field
body:
### Issue Description

podman play kube crashes with segfault on a yaml file with a container with missing image (for example due to a typo).

### Steps to reproduce the issue

run `podman play kube` with this file
```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: crashtest
spec:
  containers:
  - name: test
```


### Describe the results you received

segfault error

### Describe the results you expected

An error message on missing required key, or invalid key, in case of a typo

### podman info output

```yaml
podman version 5.7.1
Linux amd64
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body:
Hey @rafalkrupinski 

I can reproduce this!

 In the future please wrap your code snippets in back ticks, it makes it easier to read and preserves indentation, like this:

```yaml
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata: 
  name: crashtest
spec:
  containers:
    - name: test
```
